title: charge-filtered-cumulant-residuals: reproducibility envelope for charge- and block-refined bias bounds on U(1)-invariant fermionic states
description: Reproducibility repository for the manuscript 'Charge- and block-refined bias bounds for second-order cumulant truncation on U(1)-invariant fermionic states'. Contains claim-indexed audit notebooks, a pytest suite that asserts on every manuscript headline number, a SHA256-pinned data deposit (MANIFEST.json), and a headless-CI notebook workflow that reruns every notebook end-to-end on every push. Source code is MIT-licensed; deposited data and notebooks are CC-BY-4.0.
